infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Leash connects to provider devices on your local network to confirm pairing and offload inference.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Leash sends a photo you choose to your mesh for an on-device vision answer.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Leash records your voice to transcribe it on-device into a message.

plugins.cameraPermission: Leash scans a pairing QR to connect to a provider on your mesh.

plugins.microphonePermission: Leash records your voice to transcribe it on-device into a message.
